dimensions.label: Governance
dimensions.description: Degree to which agent activities are defined, approved, and reviewed in a governance registry.
evidence: 35 registry entries across 9 AIS lifecycle steps
Autonomy levels defined for all brownfield agents
gaps: 4 governance entries are overdue for review (modernization-agent, architecture-agent, implementation-agent, verification-agent)
Escalation paths not fully defined for L3 activities
dimensions.next_action: Complete overdue governance reviews before expanding agent capabilities to any new SDLC phases.

dimensions.label: Agent Coverage
dimensions.description: Coverage of the AIS SDLC lifecycle steps by properly defined and governed agents.
evidence: 10 agent definitions covering the full brownfield modernization workflow
Specialized agents: brownfield-assessor, modernization, migration, test-coverage
.github/agents contains prompt definitions for all active agents
gaps: migration-agent L3 scope requires additional governance sign-off
dimensions.next_action: Define prohibited_actions for migration-agent, test-coverage-agent, and deployment-agent before next sprint.

dimensions.label: Skill Coverage
dimensions.description: Quality and completeness of reusable skills implementing SDLC activities.
evidence: Skills versioned and include input/output definitions
gaps: 5 skills missing allowed_tools or prohibited tool restrictions
No skill versioning strategy for breaking changes
Brownfield-specific assessment skill not yet formalized
dimensions.next_action: Add tool restrictions to all remaining skill definitions; create a brownfield-assessment skill from the current agent prompt.

dimensions.label: Context & Configuration
dimensions.description: Whether agents have reliable, scoped context and the framework is properly configured.
evidence: config/aispec.config.yaml present with governance and autonomy configuration
AGENTS.md documents team roles and capabilities
gaps: Some agent prompts missing explicit scope boundary definitions
Context injection for legacy codebase metadata not fully automated
dimensions.next_action: Audit all agent prompts for explicit scope constraints; automate legacy metadata injection into context.

dimensions.label: Quality & Verification
dimensions.description: Whether agent-produced artifacts are validated by automated tests and schema checks.
evidence: 8 test files covering core workflow scenarios
gaps: Test coverage below 75% on migration-agent artifact outputs
No integration tests for the deployment pipeline end-to-end
Fewer than 10 test files — threshold not yet met
dimensions.next_action: Add end-to-end integration tests for the deployment pipeline; expand migration-agent test coverage.

dimensions.label: Delivery Automation
dimensions.description: Degree to which delivery, deployment, and quality checks are automated in CI/CD.
evidence: CI, deploy, schema validation, metrics collection, agentic scan workflows all present
Workflow success rate: 94% over reporting period
dimensions.next_action: Maintain current controls; add automated rollback trigger to deployment workflow.

dimensions.label: Documentation & Enablement
dimensions.description: Whether teams can understand, adopt, and extend the framework through documentation and playbooks.
gaps: Brownfield migration runbook is incomplete — missing rollback procedures
No getting-started guide specific to migration-agent onboarding
Internal team training materials not yet formalized
dimensions.next_action: Complete brownfield migration runbook with rollback procedures in docs/playbooks/brownfield-migration.md.
